string.text: Hold: Hold key to crouch (toggle OFF). Toggle: Tap to toggle crouch (toggle ON). Hold+Toggle: Both behaviors enabled (toggle ON).
Hold: Hold key to walk (toggle OFF). Toggle: Tap to toggle walk (toggle ON). Hold+Toggle: Both behaviors enabled (toggle ON).
Hold: Hold key to sprint (toggle OFF). Toggle: Tap to toggle sprint (toggle ON). Hold+Toggle: Both behaviors enabled (toggle ON).
Hold: Hold key to lean (toggle OFF). Toggle: Tap to toggle lean (toggle ON). Hold+Toggle: Both behaviors enabled (toggle ON).
Hold: Hold key to aim (toggle OFF). Toggle: Tap to toggle aim (toggle ON). Hold+Toggle: Both behaviors enabled (toggle ON).
Both the autowalk and forward/back keys will toggle autowalking off.
Enable debug logging for troubleshooting. Logs detailed information about inventory, PDA, and detector interactions to the game log file.
Sprinting will only cancel actions when MOVING FORWARD so you can use LSHIFT modifiers fluidly when Sprint is on LSHIFT
In Toggle/Hold+Toggle lean mode, pressing the opposite lean key will cancel the current lean instead of switching to the opposite direction. Makes it easier to cancel lean quickly.

Opens inventory on key release after a short press. Hold the inventory key to use other actions (like Quick Action Wheel). Quick tap to toggle inventory open/closed. Works with whatever key you have bound to inventory in game settings.
Prevents crouching while holding LCTRL in inventory. Useful to avoid accidental crouching when viewing full item stats.
Default: Vanilla behavior. On Release: Tap to toggle PDA. Hold to Zoom: Hold opens PDA with zoom. On Release + Zoom: Tap to open with auto-zoom.
Automatically restore your weapon and detector when closing the PDA with the PDA keybind (or Escape). Requires PDA mode
When switching from a two-handed weapon to detector, prevents one-handed weapons from appearing alongside the detector. Goes to empty hands first, then shows detector.
Quick Action Wheel: Ignore Modifiers on Hold

When HOLDING the QAW key, ignores modifier key state (Shift/Ctrl/Alt). Simple press still respects modifiers. Useful if you want long-press to always work even while holding sprint or other modifier keys.
Quick Action Wheel: Close with Reload Key
When QAW is open: Reload key (R) will close the QAW menu.
Darkens screen edges based on stance. Standing: no effect. Crouching: light vignette. Prone: stronger vignette. Smooth transitions between states.
Controls the maximum darkness of the stance vignette effect. 0.1 = subtle, 1.0 = full intensity.
Vanilla Prone: Crouch+walk = prone. Fluid Stance: Dedicated prone key. NO crouch+walk=prone. Progressive Stance: Hold crouch to prone.

Enables a dedicated prone keybind. Prone activates both crouch and walk. You can also exit prone by pressing crouch or walk keys. REQUIRES Hold or Toggle - Crouch AND Hold or Toggle - Walk to be enabled.
Disabled: No prone key. Hold: Hold key to go prone. Toggle: Tap to toggle prone. Hold+Toggle: Both behaviors enabled.
The key to activate prone mode (crouch + walk)
Use MCM Hold Time: Uses the global MCM hold time setting. Custom Delay: Set a specific delay for progressive prone detection.

How long (in milliseconds) you must hold the crouch key to trigger stance transitions. Controls: standing to prone, crouch to prone, and prone to standing. Lower = faster transitions, higher = easier to tap without accidentally changing stance.

Skips the weapon raise animation when drawing from empty hands or switching weapons. Hold fire before the weapon is ready and it will shoot as soon as the delay expires. Works the same for ADS - hold the aim button, or simply tap aim in Toggle or Hold+Toggle mode. Also enables canceling pump-action reload by holding fire or activating ADS mid-reload.

How long (in seconds) after tapping the aim key the game waits for the weapon to be ready before canceling the queued ADS. Only applies in Toggle and Hold+Toggle aim modes. Applies to any weapon switch вЂ” from another weapon, item, or empty hands.
Time (in seconds) after drawing a pistol before the queued fire or ADS is triggered. Lower values skip more of the raise animation; increase if shots fire before the animation don't look right.

Time (in seconds) after drawing a rifle, shotgun, or other weapon before the queued fire or ADS is triggered. Lower values skip more of the raise animation; increase if shots fire before the animation don't look right.

Cancels the post-reload recovery animation as soon as the ammo counter updates after a magazine reload. No need to time a press - just hold fire or have ADS active beforehand and the cancel triggers automatically.
How long (in seconds) after the ammo counter updates that a held fire button or active ADS will trigger the cancel. Increase if animations don't look right.

Cancels the post-reload recovery animation as soon as the ammo counter updates after the last shell is loaded. No need to time a press вЂ” just hold fire or have ADS active beforehand and the cancel triggers automatically.
How long (in seconds) after the ammo counter updates that a held fire button or active ADS will trigger the cancel. Increase if animation don't look right.
